uplink.description: CO2 (0x13) newer-sensor frame: two measurements (oldest-first, newest-last) + battery%. Each record carries temperature, humidity, pressure, light/lux, 3-byte bVOC and signed CO2. The newest reading is at the top level; the older one is in history. Values cross-checked by running reference/upstream-codec.js parseCo2Measurement (temp 22.50/21.00 C, RH 45.0/50.0 %, pressure 1013.25/1009.00 hPa, lux 850/300, bVOC 120/75, CO2 615/580 ppm, battery 78%).
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds CO2 frame; expected.data derived by running reference/upstream-codec.js (TTN decoder = source of truth) and mapping its fields to the normalized vocabulary (temperature->air.temperature, humidity->air.relativeHumidity, pressure->air.pressure hPa, lux->air.lightIntensity, voc->air.bvoc extra, co2->air.co2, battery%->batteryPercent extra).

uplink.description: CO2 (0x0E) older-sensor frame: two measurements (oldest-first, newest-last) + battery%. Same layout as 0x13 but with a 2-byte bVOC field. Values cross-checked against reference/upstream-codec.js parseCo2Measurement (temp 19.25/18.50 C, RH 35.0/40.0 %, pressure 998.50/995.00 hPa, lux 410/120, bVOC 88/60, CO2 562/540 ppm, battery 64%).
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds CO2 frame (older-sensor 0x0E, 2-byte bVOC); expected.data derived by running reference/upstream-codec.js and mapping to the normalized vocabulary.

uplink.description: TER (0x04) datalog frame: three temperature/humidity/pressure measurements (oldest-first) + battery%. Newest at top level, two older in history (newest-first). Cross-checked against reference/upstream-codec.js parseTER (temp 20.30/20.10/20.00 C, RH 40.0/41.0/42.0 %, pressure 1010.20/1010.10/1010.00 hPa, battery 91%).
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds TER frame; expected.data derived by running reference/upstream-codec.js parseTER and mapping its measurement fields to the normalized vocabulary (temperature->air.temperature, humidity->air.relativeHumidity, pressure->air.pressure hPa, battery%->batteryPercent extra).

uplink.description: Unsupported frame id (0x09 metering) is rejected.
